channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Du jamais-vu : les astronautes d’Artemis II vont plonger vers la Terre à 40 000 km/h !
item.description: À leur retour prévu dans quelques jours, les astronautes à bord de la mission Artemis II battront un record : celui de la rentrée atmosphérique la plus rapide jamais réalisée. Un moment préparé en détail depuis Artemis I.

item.title: Surfshark Promo Codes: 87% Off | April 2026
item.description: Save up to 87% with a Surfshark coupon code, 3 months of VPN free today, and more from WIRED.

item.title: Naturepedic Promo Codes and Deals: 20% Off
item.description: Shop the Naturepedic sale this April.

item.title: 20% Off Sephora Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Earn more points on skincare purchases when you use our Sephora coupon.

item.title: Hungryroot Coupon Codes: 30% Off This April
item.description: Get up to 30% off your first order and free gifts using a Hungryroot promo code today. Discover our best coupons and discounts to let you save on your healthy groceries as a new or returning customer.

item.title: Govee Discount Codes and Deals: 30% Off
item.description: New to Govee? Get a $5 coupon on your first purchase just for signing up.

item.title: Sealy Promo Code: Save $200 on Mattresses This Month
item.description: Whether you’re switching from springs to memory foam or just want to sleep cooler this summer, these Sealy mattress deals will have you waking up refreshed—and with cash left in your wallet.

item.title: Vivid Seats Promo Codes and Deals: Save 10% This April
item.description: Whether you are heading to a sold-out concert or a championship game, use a Vivid Seats discount code to secure your seats for less this month.

item.title: Factor Promo Code: 50% Off Off Meal Prep
item.description: Make meal prep easier for any dietary need while enjoying great savings with our hand-picked Factor discount codes this April.

item.title: Today is your last chance to score the Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold, but it will sell out in minutes — here’s what you can do to boost your odds
item.description: Samsung is restocking the Galaxy Z TriFold for the last time today, and it's your last chance to buy the historic smartphone.

item.title: All the states Pornhub is blocked in now
item.description: Due to age-verification laws, Pornhub has blocked itself in 22 U.S. states as of April 2026.
